title: Faroe Islands vote as Greenland faces geopolitical crosswinds
summary_full: Like neighbouring Greenland, the Faroe Islands are self-governing, with broad domestic autonomy but foreign and security policy set in Copenhagen
summary_public: Like neighbouring Greenland, the Faroe Islands are self-governing, with broad domestic autonomy but foreign and security policy set in Copenhagen
